projectDescription: A fully-typed, customizable onboarding component for Vue 3
keyFeatures: TypeScript First - Full type support out of the box
Customizable UI - Use default styling or bring your own with slots
Accessible - Built-in focus trap for keyboard navigation
Flexible Positioning - Smart tooltip placement with Popper.js
SVG Overlay - Highlight elements with customizable overlay
Lifecycle Hooks - onBeforeStep and onAfterStep for custom logic
Nuxt 3 Module - First-class support with auto-imports
Vue 3 Composition API - Modern reactive architecture
publicApiSurface: VOnboardingWrapper - Main component for creating onboarding tours
VOnboardingStep - Component for rendering individual tour steps
useVOnboarding - Composable for programmatic tour control (start, finish, goToStep, exit)
StepEntity - TypeScript interface defining step configuration
AttachableElement - Type for element attachment (string selector, ref, or function)
onBeforeStepOptions - Hook options passed to beforeStep callback
onAfterStepOptions - Hook options passed to afterStep callback
Nuxt Module - v-onboarding/nuxt with auto-import configuration
